checking_profile: Thanks for checking out my profile!
intro_1: I am a Data & AI specialist with a deep passion for innovation, creativity and technology. I thrive on exploring the latest techniques and turning them into smart, practical solutions that make work more beautiful and efficient. I combine analytical thinking with a creative approach, always with an eye for quality, reliability and safety.
intro_2: In my own time, I also love experimenting with the latest technological and data-driven techniques. Especially in the areas of sound, visualization and storytelling, I am constantly looking for new ways to use technology creatively and bring ideas to life. That curiosity and drive to discover is something I bring to my work as well.
name: Name:
rws_ai_1: Researching and building agentic RAG systems for unlocking data within Rijkswaterstaat.
ml_engineer_1: Developing and deploying an ML model for predicting wildfires in the Netherlands.
ml_engineer_2: DevOps for machine learning within a SCRUM team.
genai_1: Researching vision-transformer architectures for automatically updating the Dutch road map.
genai_2: Implementing AI models in N8N automation workflows.
frontend_1: Building apps with Google Flutter in an Agile team. REST APIs, state management and deeplinking.
data_scientist_1: Building an optimization model in Python for Li-ion battery trading on Dutch electricity markets.
masters_degree_1_body_1: Data Science of the Dutch energy grid. Thesis: predicting imbalance prices and optimizing home-battery charging.
masters_degree_2_body_1: Storytelling and writing for diverse audiences. From short stories to academic communication.
dub_desc: Writing articles and producing informational videos for the Utrecht University newspaper.
festenpure_desc: Own company. Organizing group holidays and workations to the South of France. Marketing, logistics and community building.
cert_agentic: Developing agentic AI applications with large language models.
cert_ml: Developing and training ML models with NumPy, scikit-learn and TensorFlow.
description_2: Analyzing complex datasets and quickly adapting to new domains. From data exploration to prediction models — I translate raw data into actionable insights.
description_ai: Training and deploying ML models, applying vision transformers and building agentic RAG systems. Experience gained at Rijkswaterstaat and KNMI.
description_3: I understand how teams build software together. Experience with Flutter, Angular, HTML/CSS/JS, Docker, AWS and CI/CD pipelines.
description_5: Quickly immersing in new domains and communicating complex topics clearly. Trained as a journalist and academic writer.
description_6: Experience with GIS geodata engineering and processing spatial data for infrastructure challenges.
modal_desc_rws: At Rijkswaterstaat I work on AI solutions for unlocking and leveraging internal data. From vision transformers for map processing to agentic RAG systems that make large volumes of documentation searchable and usable.
modal_desc_knmi: At KNMI I contributed to a pilot project predicting wildfires in the Netherlands using machine learning. The model combines weather data with NIPV information and generates a two-week forecast for emergency services.
modal_desc_1: I made this song Today as a tribute to the transient essence of autumn and life in general. Filmed in Wilhelminapark, Utrecht.
modal_desc_2: Together with Bart van Son I founded our own company in 2022. We organize group trips and workations in the Netherlands and South of France. Central themes: nature, movement and relaxation.
modal_desc_3: As a side-activity, I organize sports events for international students and create the promotional reels.
modal_desc_4: Filmed together with Bart van Son. A visualization of life and its paradoxes — a delicate mix between dark realities and bright ideals.
modal_desc_5: At DTT I worked on more than five apps with Dart and Google Flutter. Teladoc was the largest and most security-critical project due to sensitive medical data.
modal_desc_6: In collaboration with Bart van Son. 'Back to basics' is an abstract piece that unravels the layers of our fast-paced existence with a hint of mystique. Music by me.
modal_desc_7: Researching ML techniques to predict imbalance prices and optimize home-battery charging on the Dutch energy grid.
modal_desc_8: DJ set in the mountains — organizing, hosting and filming all at once. Blending music with nature.
modal_desc_9: Debut DJ set on a watchtower in Rotterdam. Funky grooves paired with a breathtaking sunset.
modal_desc_10: Website for Fest en Pure built with Wordpress Elementor Pro.
modal_desc_11: Short video portrait of Huub and his daily cold water practice. Music by me.
motivated: I'm always open to a good conversation about work that combines data and creativity — preferably in a context with societal impact. Have an idea or project? Feel free to reach out.
blog_subtitle: My thoughts on technology, AI, and society.
blog_title_1: AI Coding Agents: the future of software development
blog_excerpt_1: How AI-powered coding agents are fundamentally changing the way we build software, and what this means for developers.
blog_excerpt_2: An overview of the most important AI developments and what they mean for businesses and individuals.
blog_title_3: The role of government in the technological transition
blog_excerpt_3: How can governments balance stimulating innovation with protecting citizens in the age of AI?
creative_projects_subtitle: A selection of my creative work in music, video, stories and entrepreneurship.
professional_projects_subtitle: A selection of projects I have worked on professionally.
